what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-5754e6f9, of type board_items, to board item item-085f8b05 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-085f8b05
No code symbols or executable content
standouts: Uses a board:// URI to reference a target board item
Serves as a join record between a channel attachment and a board item
notes: A bare attachment-to-board-item linkage record for dragnet-development with no payload.
questions: What content or action does the referenced board item item-085f8b05 represent?
What does the board_items attachment_type imply about how this record is consumed?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: it is a metadata record linking an attachment to a board item.
intention_signals: It appears to track that a specific board item is attached to or referenced within the dragnet-development channel memory.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, supporting retrieval of board-related context from channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-5754e6f9 in dragnet-development to board item item-085f8b05 via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is associated with the dragnet-development channel as an attachment.
